note: Entity Vital Signs registry added to organvm-scrutator. Tracked 8 entities with pathos/logos/ethos scores, trends, and diagnoses. IRF and corpus updated.
protocol: CLAIM-BEFORE-USE: git pull, read next_id, increment by count needed, commit+push THIS FILE, then assign IDs. If push fails (non-fast-forward), pull, re-read, retry. Never assign DONE-NNN without claiming here first.
